title: UnifaceComponent.activate
breadcrumbs: APIs: Java Call-In Classes and Methods
text: UnifaceComponent.activate This method activates the requested operation. Explain this code import com.rocketsoftware.uniface.jci.*; int accept() throws UnifaceException; Copy Parameters operationName Desired operation. parameters An array of objects containing the parameters for operationName . parameters[0] is used for the return value. parameters[1..n] are used for the operationName parameters. Return Values Returns the value of $status and can throw one of the following exceptions: NoSuchOperationException when the operation is not provided. UnifaceException when the activate fails for some other reason. Description UnifaceComponent is the base class of the Java call-in. It provides the classes that implement the activate method. Uniface generates methods that use the activate method when the Java (or JavaBean) wrappers are generated. Example: quit Method For example, the following Java code is generated for the quit operation: Explain this code /** Operation quit. */ public int quit () throws UnifaceException { Object params[] = new Object[1]; int status = activate ("quit", params); return status; } Copy Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
